---
title: "About Me"
---

## Hi, I'm Jenny Höglauer

### An International Management and Global Business Student with a strong interest in Finance, Strategy and Data Analytics.

I am currently completing my Double Degree at ESB Business School in Germany and Dublin City University in Ireland, where I have developed a solid foundation in business, finance and strategic analysis. Studying in an international environment has shaped my perspective and strengthened my ability to understand how markets, institutions and economic systems interact across borders.

My interest in finance and strategy developed through both my studies and my practical experience in the banking sector. During my time at Landesbank Baden-Württemberg, I worked on market and competitive analyses and gained insights into how strategic decisions are developed in a regulated environment. This experience sparked my curiosity for understanding financial systems not only at a company level, but within a broader economic and regulatory context.

Alongside this, I developed a strong interest in data analytics. I enjoy working with data, identifying patterns and translating complex information into structured insights that support decision-making.

Outside of my academic background, I have been actively involved in sports, particularly tennis. I led my school's "Jugend trainiert für Olympia" team, which helped me develop a sense of responsibility and teamwork. I also took part in the German Chess Championship in 2015, which strengthened my analytical thinking and strategic approach to problem-solving.

In addition, I have a personal interest in medicine and the healthcare sector, which has led me to explore the pharmaceutical industry and its connection to business, innovation and regulation.

Looking ahead, I aim to build a career at the intersection of finance, strategy and policy, where I can contribute to understanding complex systems and supporting informed decision-making in an international context.

---

## {{< fa graduation-cap >}} Education

| Degree | Institution | Period |
|--------|-------------|--------|
| Global Business Studies, BA (Double Degree) | Dublin City University, Ireland | since 09/2024 |
| International Management, BSc (Double Degree) | ESB Business School, Germany | 09/2022 – 09/2024 |
| Chemical and Biological Engineering | Stuttgart University, Germany | 11/2020 – 04/2022 |
| Bilingual A-Levels (English, French, Biology) | Hohenstaufen Gymnasium, Germany | 09/2012 – 07/2020 |

![Dublin City University](images/dcu.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

![Studying in Ireland](images/ireland.jpeg){width=70% fig-align="center"}

---

## {{< fa briefcase >}} Work Experience

### Landesbank Baden-Württemberg (LBBW)
**Intern & Working Student** | Stuttgart, Germany | 07/2023 – 09/2024

During my internship I worked on market and competitive analyses and gained 
insights into how strategic decisions are developed in a regulated banking 
environment. As a working student in the **Ideas Management and Process Consulting** 
department, I supported internal innovation processes and contributed to 
process optimisation initiatives. This experience sparked my curiosity for 
understanding financial systems at both a company and regulatory level.

### Click&Boat
**Junior Sales Executive Intern** | Barcelona, Spain | 03/2025 – 08/2025

Worked in B2C inbound sales and booking conversion in an international marketplace.
Responsibilities included lead qualification, follow-up and CRM management. 
I developed strong sales techniques including upselling 
and customer relationship management, while working across three languages, namely English, German and French, in a fast-paced international environment.

![Barcelona](images/barcelona.jpeg){width=70% fig-align="center"}

---

## {{< fa person >}} Personal Interests 

Beyond my academic and professional background, I am driven by curiosity 
and a passion for understanding complex systems.

I have been actively involved in **tennis** throughout my life, leading my 
school's *"Jugend trainiert für Olympia"* team. At the age of 12, I became 
the **Württemberg Chess Champion** in my age group and represented SC Grunbach 
at the German Chess Championship in 2015.

![Chess Championship](images/chess.jpeg){width=60% fig-align="center"}

![IMX Double Degree](images/marketing.jpeg){width=70% fig-align="center"}

I also have a personal interest in medicine and the healthcare sector, 
exploring the intersection of business, innovation and regulation in the 
pharmaceutical industry.

**Languages:** German (native) | English (fluent) | French (fluent) | Russian (good knowledge)
